## 1-1-101. Deployer notice

A deployer shall notify any individual subject to a fake decision at the point of interaction.
The notice shall include the nature of the technology and the individual's right to seek review.

## 1-1-102. Consumer rights - correction - human review

An individual subject to a fake decision may request a correction or human review within 45 days
of receiving notice. The deployer shall respond within 30 days of the request.
